ValidationRule.description: To update the Lost/Cancelled Reason to move the quote status.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Permission.CONTAINER_Bypass_Validation_Rule), NOT(ISNEW()), OR($RecordType.Name = "Container GENSET Quote",$RecordType.Name = "Container NT Quote"), OR(OR(ISPICKVAL( CONTAINER_Status__c , "Lost"), ISPICKVAL(CONTAINER_Status__c, "Cancelled")), ISPICKVAL(CONTAINER_QuotePath__c, "Lost/Cancelled")) , ISBLANK( CONTAINER_Reason_for_won_or_lost__c ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Update the "Reason for 'won' or lost' or ' no-order'" to move the quote status.
